control.label: Set stacked widget load delay in milliseconds (1000ms = 1 second)[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]action[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
Show countdown timer for stacked widget load delay[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]toggle[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
Enable icon silhouettes for category widgets[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]toggle[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
Default home screen search icon behavior[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]action[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
Enable one-click trailers (long press play/pause button or 't' key on keyboard)[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]toggle[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
Configure default view per content type[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]action[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
OMDb API Key (ratings fallback + vote counts)[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]action[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
TMDb API key enables automatic ID conversion for better ratings accuracy.
[COLOR FFFF6600][B]DEBUG[/B][/COLOR] Show view debug overlay (MyVideoNav)[CR][COLOR grey][LIGHT][UPPERCASE]toggle[/UPPERCASE][/LIGHT][/COLOR]
control.label2: Shows ViewMode, Content, Plugin, Control visibility on screen
